prompt: Create worker-pool.js that exports a WorkerPool class using Node.js worker_threads. Constructor takes a worker script path and pool size. It should have: exec(data) that returns a Promise with the result, drain() that waits for all pending tasks to complete, and destroy() that terminates all workers. A sample worker.js is provided in the workspace that computes factorials.
description: Build a worker thread pool with task queuing
